summary: Phase 1 features fully tested and working. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all new features: Dashboard with 5 KPI cards including Net Profit, Historical Comparison with human-readable labels (e.g., '2026 Week 7 (Feb)', 'February 2026'), Markets page with Copy Preset dropdown, Sales Dashboard with 3 Excel export buttons, Inventory/Cashflow Trackers with Export Excel buttons, Data Repository with snapshot CRUD and backup/restore, Settings page with password change form, and Manual page with walkthrough sections.
passed_tests: Backend: Owner login - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/kpis returns net_profit, gst_amount, total_cash_expenses - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/historical returns label field in week_over_week and month_over_month - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/markets returns list of markets - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/markets/{id}/copy-preset copies preset - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/export/sessions-excel returns Excel file - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/export/products-excel returns Excel file - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/export/inventory-excel returns Excel file - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/export/cashflow-excel returns Excel file - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/export/sales-by-month-market returns Excel file - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/snapshots creates a snapshot - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/snapshots lists snapshots - SUCCESS
Backend: PUT /api/snapshots/{id} edits a snapshot - SUCCESS
Backend: DELETE /api/snapshots/{id} deletes a snapshot - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/backup/export returns JSON backup - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/backup/restore validates backup format - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password rejects wrong current password - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password rejects short new password - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password changes password successfully - SUCCESS
Backend: Cleanup test snapshots - SUCCESS
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 5 KPI cards including Net Profit ($7,597.48) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Historical Comparison page loads with human-readable week labels (e.g., '2026 Week 7 (Feb)') - SUCCESS
Frontend: Historical Comparison Month over Month tab shows month labels (e.g., 'February 2026') - SUCCESS
Frontend: Markets page loads with Copy Preset dropdown (data-testid=copy-source-select) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Sales Dashboard loads with 3 export buttons (Sessions Excel, Products Excel, Monthly by Market) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Inventory Tracker has Export Excel button (data-testid=export-inventory-btn) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Cashflow Tracker has Export Excel button (data-testid=export-cashflow-btn) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Data Repository page loads with snapshot CRUD and backup/restore buttons - SUCCESS
Frontend: Settings page loads with password change form - SUCCESS
Frontend: Manual page loads with 10 walkthrough sections - SUCCESS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) Dashboard shows 5 KPI cards including Net Profit which deducts GST and cash expenses from gross profit, (2) Historical Comparison shows human-readable labels like '2026 Week 7 (Feb)' and 'February 2026', (3) Markets page has Copy Preset dropdown to copy preset_mix from one market to another, (4) Sales Dashboard has 3 Excel export buttons, (5) Inventory and Cashflow Trackers have Export Excel buttons, (6) Data Repository supports snapshot CRUD and JSON backup/restore, (7) Settings page has password change form, (8) Manual page has comprehensive walkthrough sections. All Excel exports use openpyxl and return .xlsx files. Backup/restore uses JSON format. Snapshots stored in 'data_snapshots' collection.
